rationale: An administrator account created and started a new service named 'Example Service' (A0, EV-002) from a suspicious path 'C:\Program Files\windows_service.exe' (A0). The service was then executed by 'NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM' (EV-003). The service and its associated files were subsequently deleted (EV-004), which is often an attempt to remove traces of activity. The parent command line (EV-001) shows multiple file copies and service operations in a single command, which is unusual for legitimate activity.
